hero.eyebrow: Natural tomato and pepper breeding, big flavor
hero.heading: Buy tomatoes that melt in your mouth.
hero.lead: We cultivate resilient heritage lines and starter plants adapted for our climate. From seed to harvest, we offer you the best tomato.

items.title: Large quantity
items.description: We have the capacity to supply large quantities of tomatoes for legal and natural persons. Our tomatoes are raised indoors and hardened off for the local climate.

items.title: Delivery
items.description: Order tomatoes and we deliver directly to your market or home. We offer flexible delivery schedules during the growing season.

items.title: The best prices
items.description: We offer competitive pricing for all our tomato varieties, ensuring you get the best value for your investment.

benefits.heading: Built for flavor, tested for resilience.
benefits.lead: Our breeding program prioritizes taste, disease resistance, and consistent harvests.

items.title: Bred for Taste
items.description: Hand-picked flavor profiles with professional tasting notes.

items.title: Built for Resilience
items.description: Adapted genetics for short seasons and cool climates.

items.title: Estate-Quality Genetics:
items.description: Open-pollinated lines refined over seasons to ensure every bite is as good as the last.

items.title: Great Price/Quality ratio
items.description: Get the elite flavor and hardy resilience of a boutique breeding program at a price that makes a gourmet harvest accessible to every backyard.

contact.heading: Make the world tastier with us.

promo.heading: 🌱 First-Time Customer Special
promo.description: Get 15% off your first order! Fresh tomatoes delivered to your doorstep.
